handoff_history: [ARCHITECT] The user service decomposes into three atomic components: (1) store — an in-memory thread-safe CRUD store for User records; (2) handlers — HTTP handler functions implementing all four CRUD endpoints with correct status codes and JSON serialisation; (3) integrate — main.go that wires store and handlers together and starts the HTTP server on port 8080. No composite intermediates are needed. Output module path is github.com/cornjacket/ai-builder/sandbox/user-service-output.
